source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析7》

segments.text: Russ: Erm ... hello Professor, I'm Russ.
segments.translation: 嗯……教授，您好，我是拉斯。

segments.text: Russ: I spoke to you on the phone last week.
segments.translation: 我上周和您通过电话。

segments.text: Tutor: Ah, yes, come in and have a seat.
segments.translation: 啊，是的，请进，坐吧。

segments.text: Tutor: You want to talk to me about the archaeology course, right?
segments.translation: 你是想和我谈谈考古学课程，对吧？

segments.text: Russ: Yes, I've read the handbook, but I still have some questions and want to know more details before deciding whether to do it.
segments.translation: 是的，我读过课程手册了，但还有一些问题。在决定是否选修之前，我想了解更多细节。

segments.text: Tutor: Right.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Tutor: So, what would you like to know?
segments.translation: 那么，你想了解什么？

segments.text: Russ: Well, first of all, when I choose the archaeology course, can I integrate it with other subjects?
segments.translation: 首先，如果我选择考古学课程，可以把它和其他学科结合起来学习吗？

segments.text: Russ: For example, one in anthropology?
segments.translation: 比如人类学课程？

segments.text: Tutor: Yes, it can be combined with any other subjects apart from classical history.
segments.translation: 可以。除了古典史之外，它可以与任何其他学科组合。

segments.text: Tutor: That's because there is some overlap in the lecture times for those two courses.
segments.translation: 这是因为这两门课程的上课时间有些重叠。

segments.text: Tutor: We weren't able to coordinate them.
segments.translation: 我们没能把它们协调开。

segments.text: Russ: That's OK.
segments.translation: 没关系。

segments.text: Russ: Then about the modules, could you tell me the details?
segments.translation: 那么关于课程模块，您能告诉我一些详细信息吗？

segments.text: Tutor: In the first semester, there are three modules, all of which are compulsory.
segments.translation: 第一学期有三个模块，而且全都是必修的。

segments.text: Russ: What about optional modules?
segments.translation: 那选修模块呢？

segments.text: Tutor: Well, we don't offer optional modules until next semester.
segments.translation: 我们要到下学期才会开设选修模块。

segments.text: Russ: OK.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Tutor: The first module is called Object Matters, and Dr Morris teaches it.
segments.translation: 第一个模块叫“物件研究”，由莫里斯博士授课。

segments.text: Tutor: This module is mainly about what can be learnt from specific artifacts such as pottery and stone tools.
segments.translation: 这个模块主要研究能从陶器、石器等具体文物中了解到什么。

segments.text: Russ: That's something I've never heard about.
segments.translation: 这个内容我以前从没听说过。

segments.text: Russ: I'm interested.
segments.translation: 我很感兴趣。

segments.text: Russ: How is the module presented?
segments.translation: 这个模块采用什么授课形式？

segments.text: Russ: I mean, is it all lectures?
segments.translation: 我是说，全部都是讲座吗？

segments.text: Tutor: Well, you mean the learning method.
segments.translation: 你指的是学习方式吧。

segments.text: Tutor: In this case, its lectures are combined with practical sessions, so it's a mixture.
segments.translation: 这个模块把讲座与实践课结合起来，所以采用的是混合形式。

segments.text: Russ: What about the content of the module?
segments.translation: 这个模块的内容呢？

segments.text: Russ: I suppose we will be looking at different kinds of archaeological remains and how to date them, that kind of thing.
segments.translation: 我想我们会研究不同种类的考古遗存，以及如何确定它们的年代，诸如此类的内容。

segments.text: Tutor: To some extent, yes.
segments.translation: 在某种程度上，是的。

segments.text: Tutor: But the module is based on processes.
segments.translation: 不过，这个模块以研究流程为基础。

segments.text: Tutor: And it covers four aspects in detail: first of all, recording material, and then classification, then the interpretation of the data, that's how archaeologists conclude their findings, and finally, display.
segments.translation: 它会详细讲解四个方面：首先是材料记录，然后是分类，接着是数据解读，也就是考古学家如何得出研究结论，最后是展示。

segments.text: Tutor: Is that OK for you?
segments.translation: 这些内容你能接受吗？

segments.text: Russ: I think so.
segments.translation: 我想可以。

segments.text: Russ: Yes, thanks!
segments.translation: 可以，谢谢！

segments.text: Russ: Oh, one important thing, how is the module assessed?
segments.translation: 哦，还有一件重要的事，这个模块如何考核？

segments.text: Russ: Should we take an exam at the end of the semester?
segments.translation: 我们要在学期末参加考试吗？

segments.text: Tutor: No.
segments.translation: 不用。

segments.text: Tutor: It's all based on coursework after each lecture, so try your best when the lecturer assigns you a task.
segments.translation: 考核全部依据每次讲座后的课程作业，所以老师布置任务时要尽力做好。

segments.text: Russ: OK.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Tutor: The second module's title is Towns and Cities.
segments.translation: 第二个模块的名称是“城镇与城市”。

segments.text: Tutor: It is taught by Professor Elliot, the head of our department.
segments.translation: 这门课由我们系主任埃利奥特教授授课。

segments.text: Tutor: And as the name suggests, the module focuses on the origins of built environments and how they developed.
segments.translation: 顾名思义，这个模块重点研究人造环境的起源及其发展过程。

segments.text: Russ: That's mainly factual, I suppose.
segments.translation: 我想，这主要是事实性内容吧。

segments.text: Tutor: It is.
segments.translation: 是的。

segments.text: Tutor: And for that reason, it is assessed by examination.
segments.translation: 正因如此，这个模块采用考试的方式进行考核。

segments.text: Tutor: But instead of a written exam, we set it as an oral one, as we think most students prefer this way.
segments.translation: 不过，我们安排的是口试而不是笔试，因为我们认为大多数学生更喜欢这种方式。

segments.text: Russ: It sounds a bit scary.
segments.translation: 听起来有点吓人。

segments.text: Russ: I prefer written exams.
segments.translation: 我更喜欢笔试。

segments.text: Tutor: Don't worry too much.
segments.translation: 不用太担心。

segments.text: Tutor: Most of our students find they enjoy it.
segments.translation: 我们大多数学生都发现自己其实很享受口试。

segments.text: Russ: OK.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Tutor: And then the third module is called Method and Science.
segments.translation: 第三个模块叫“方法与科学”。

segments.text: Tutor: And in this module, Dr Thompson will introduce you to the standard techniques used in archaeological fieldwork and analysis, such as excavating and dating.
segments.translation: 在这个模块中，汤普森博士会向你介绍考古田野工作和分析中使用的标准技术，例如发掘和年代测定。

segments.text: Russ: What about the learning method for this module?
segments.translation: 这个模块采用什么学习方式？

segments.text: Russ: Are there any lectures, or it's all laboratory work?
segments.translation: 有讲座吗，还是全部都是实验室工作？

segments.text: Tutor: Oh, there aren't any lectures.
segments.translation: 哦，没有讲座。

segments.text: Tutor: It combines half lab work and half seminars.
segments.translation: 它由一半实验室工作和一半研讨课组成。

segments.text: Russ: What about the assessment?
segments.translation: 考核方式呢？

segments.text: Tutor: Oh, you are lucky; this module has no formal assessment.
segments.translation: 哦，你很幸运，这个模块没有正式考核。

segments.text: Tutor: But right at the end of the module, you will have to take part in a site survey.
segments.translation: 不过，在模块即将结束时，你必须参加一次遗址调查。

segments.text: Russ: That's great!
segments.translation: 太好了！

segments.text: Russ: Where shall we go for the site survey?
segments.translation: 我们要去哪里进行遗址调查？

segments.text: Tutor: Sorry, I can't tell you the location yet.
segments.translation: 抱歉，我还不能告诉你地点。

segments.text: Tutor: That would be announced later.
segments.translation: 地点稍后会公布。

segments.text: Tutor: The date for that is the week beginning the 10th of March.
segments.translation: 调查安排在3月10日开始的那一周。

segments.text: Russ: OK.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Russ: That's all I want to know.
segments.translation: 我想了解的就是这些。

segments.text: Russ: Thank you very much, Professor.
segments.translation: 非常感谢您，教授。

segments.text: Russ: Bye!
segments.translation: 再见！

segments.text: Tutor: You are welcome, Russ.
segments.translation: 不客气，拉斯。

segments.text: Tutor: Bye!
segments.translation: 再见！
